name: Staff IaC Architecture Review Rubric
instructions: Evaluate whether the infrastructure review demonstrates evidence-backed Staff-level judgment, Terragrunt/OpenTofu expertise, and actionable prioritization for a multi-account AWS hub-and-spoke architecture.

evidence_quality.criteria: Rate 1-5. Score 5 if findings consistently cite specific modules, HCL files, dependency blocks, or observable configurations. Score 1 if conclusions are unsupported or speculative.

hallucination_resistance.criteria: Rate 1-5. Score 5 if uncertainty is acknowledged and unsupported claims are discarded. Score 1 if the review invents missing infrastructure or overstates confidence.

iac_pragmatism.criteria: Rate 1-5. Score 5 if recommendations favor incremental, Terragrunt-native improvements. Score 1 if the review defaults to adding unnecessary abstraction layers, custom orchestration, or tool sprawl.

operational_reasoning.criteria: Rate 1-5. Score 5 if the review identifies realistic failure modes, deployment ordering risks, state management issues, or security gaps grounded in the actual configuration. Score 1 if recommendations remain purely theoretical.

prioritization_quality.criteria: Rate 1-5. Score 5 if recommendations are ranked by blast radius, security impact, and deployment safety. Score 1 if the report treats all findings as equally important.
